item.title: Cloud provisioning timeout constants duplicated across 4 provider files — not in config/defaults.ts
item.intent: All cloud provisioning timeout constants have a single source of truth in config/defaults.ts. No timeout literals appear in provider files.
item.description: CLOUD_API_TIMEOUT_MS = 30_000 is duplicated identically in aws.ts:46, hetzner.ts:32, gcp.ts:46, and digitalocean.ts. CLOUD_POLL_TIMEOUT_MS and CLOUD_OPERATION_TIMEOUT_MS are also defined inline per provider. Per project convention, magic numbers belong in config/defaults.ts. Steps: (1) grep provider files for all timeout constant definitions; (2) add CLOUD_API_TIMEOUT_MS, CLOUD_POLL_TIMEOUT_MS, CLOUD_OPERATION_TIMEOUT_MS to config/defaults.ts; (3) replace all inline literals with imports; (4) run cloud/provisioning tests. Scope: 4-5 files, no logic change.
acceptanceCriteria: No timeout constants duplicated across provider files
CLOUD_API_TIMEOUT_MS, CLOUD_POLL_TIMEOUT_MS, CLOUD_OPERATION_TIMEOUT_MS defined once in config/defaults.ts
All provider files import timeout constants from defaults
cloud/provisioning tests pass with no regression
